learn.core_idea: FIFO page replacement evicts the oldest resident page regardless of recent usage.
mechanism_steps: New fault with full memory triggers eviction.
New page is inserted as newest resident.
learn.worked_example: Accessing a third page with two frames evicts first-loaded page under FIFO.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can list resident pages by load order.
I can predict FIFO victim page.
I can match victim logic to observed faults.
